labels.value: Required fields for the import file are part number and order quantity. Save as a .csv (comma delimited) file for upload.

labels.shortDescription: NATT PAO - View Weights and Dimensions

labels.value: There are valid parts that do not have a Quantity value. These parts will get cleared if you do not add a quantity value. If you wish to continue clearing errors, including the valid part(s), click continue. Otherwise, close this window and add a Quantity value to the valid parts.

Unable to load Who is Who data
Missing case line item detail. PPG cannot take further action.
This table currently has no data to display
This is a required entry. At least 1 row must be selected.

Use parentheses, AND, OR, and NOT to customize the logic. For example, if you enter “(1 AND 2 AND 3) OR 4”, the flow evaluates whether the first three conditions are true or only the fourth condition is true.
You provided an unsupported value for the DataTypeFilter input on Object and Field Picker. Currently the only supported value is ’picklist’
You don\'t have the proper permissions for ths action
"Manager APEX Class" can not be empty
There are multiple groups for that role
Sharing Settings must be private or public read/write to enable manual sharing
Only the record owner or administrators can modify permissions
Your search found more than 200 results. Keep typing to make it more specific
You are not allowed to enter '0' as QTY. If you want to remove the item from the cart, please use the 'Delete' button to remove this item from the cart.
Are you sure you want to cancel the bulk upload of products from the selected file?
You will lose all uploaded data and will be taken back to Upload Order page if you select yes.
Are you sure you want to add items to cart?
Items with Error code will not be added*
Looks like the CSV file uploaded was empty.
Looks like the CSV file uploaded contains only the Header Row.
We are not able to process the uploaded products at this moment. Please try again. If this error is persistence, then please contact your system admin.
Looks like the CSV file uploaded contains more than 2 columns. Please upload the file in the same format as the template file.
Uploaded file cannot be processed. Please re-upload the file with not more than 100 line items
There was an error in uploading the CSV file, please contact your system admin for more details.
There was an error in reading the CSV file, please contact your system admin for more details.
Download the Global Pricebook for all products as Excel or PDF
Are you sure you want to clear the cart?
Check again in 24 hours or Contact Customer service for availability
Download the Global Pricebook for all products as a CSV and PDF
Looks like you haven't placed any orders yet!
Please select the file type to download
No partial shipments. Shipment will wait to send until all items are available.
Click OK if you agree with the above.
The cart that you requested isn't available.
Search or browse products, and add them to your cart. Your selections appear here.
